examples.name: Main example
examples.erb_code: <%= form.text_field :name, label: "Store name", placeholder: "Become a merchant" %>

examples.name: Specific error messages for merchant context
examples.erb_code:
<%= form.text_field :name, label:"Product weight", error:"Invalid value" %>

<%= form.text_field :name,
    label:"Product weight",
    error:"Weight must be greater than 0 and less than 500 pounds for shipping calculations"
   %>

<%= form.text_field :name,
    label:"SKU",
    error:"SKU 'TSHIRT-001' already exists. SKUs must be unique across all products." %>
